rulings.Case Title: KAREN TORAN VS. FRANCIS M. JONES et al
rulings.Rulings: 1st cause of action Disability Discrimination, Harassment, Retailiation - FEHA: SUSTAIN with leave to amend to allege facts showing conduct by Jones outside that necessary for job performance. 2nd cause of action Violation of CA Family Rights Act [CFRA]: SUSTAIN without leave Jones is not Plaintiff's employer. See Government Code 19245.2(c)(2). 3rd cause of action Disability Discrimination: SUSTAIN without leave to amend. Failure to accommodate is barred by Reno v Baird (1998) 18 Cal.App.4th 640. Accommodation is part of personnel duties. If claim is retaliation it is duplicative. 4th cause of action IIED: SUSTAIN with leave to amend to allege conduct outside of that necessary to carry out managerial and personnel duties. (CW)
